name: LOCKHEED CORPORATION, et al. v. PAUL L. SPINK
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in LOCKHEED CORPORATION, et al. v. PAUL L. SPINK (517 U.S. 882, 1995 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
